targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT
    t.target_name,
    t.environment,
    t.db_type,
    t.instance,
    t.criticality,
    t.team,
    r.checked_at,
    r.is_up,
    r.latency_ms
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets t
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT checked_at, is_up, latency_ms
    FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
    WHERE r.target_name = t.target_name
    ORDER BY checked_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) r ON true
  WHERE t.is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '%' OR t.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR t.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR t.target_name = '$target')
)

SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_up = 1)::bigint AS up_now
FROM latest;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT
    t.target_name,
    t.environment,
    t.db_type,
    t.instance,
    t.criticality,
    t.team,
    r.checked_at,
    r.is_up,
    r.latency_ms
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets t
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT checked_at, is_up, latency_ms
    FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
    WHERE r.target_name = t.target_name
    ORDER BY checked_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) r ON true
  WHERE t.is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '%' OR t.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR t.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR t.target_name = '$target')
)

SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE coalesce(is_up, 0) = 0)::bigint AS down_now
FROM latest;

WITH minute_samples AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', r.checked_at) AS period_minute,
    r.target_name,
    min(r.is_up) AS is_up
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
  WHERE $__timeFilter(r.checked_at) AND ('$environment' = '%' OR r.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR r.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR r.target_name = '$target')
  GROUP BY 1, 2
), target_availability AS (
  SELECT target_name, avg(is_up) AS availability
  FROM minute_samples
  GROUP BY target_name
)
SELECT coalesce(round(avg(availability)::numeric * 100, 2), 0) AS availability_pct
FROM target_availability;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT
    t.target_name,
    t.environment,
    t.db_type,
    t.instance,
    t.criticality,
    t.team,
    r.checked_at,
    r.is_up,
    r.latency_ms
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets t
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT checked_at, is_up, latency_ms
    FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
    WHERE r.target_name = t.target_name
    ORDER BY checked_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) r ON true
  WHERE t.is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '%' OR t.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR t.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR t.target_name = '$target')
)
SELECT round((avg(latency_ms) / 1000.0)::numeric, 2)::double precision AS avg_latency_seconds
FROM latest
WHERE is_up = 1;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT
    t.target_name,
    t.environment,
    t.db_type,
    t.instance,
    t.criticality,
    t.team,
    r.checked_at,
    r.is_up,
    r.latency_ms
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets t
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT checked_at, is_up, latency_ms
    FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
    WHERE r.target_name = t.target_name
    ORDER BY checked_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) r ON true
  WHERE t.is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '%' OR t.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR t.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR t.target_name = '$target')
)

SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_up = 1 AND latency_ms > 3000)::bigint AS slow_probes
FROM latest;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT
    t.target_name,
    t.environment,
    t.db_type,
    t.instance,
    t.criticality,
    t.team,
    r.checked_at,
    r.is_up,
    r.latency_ms
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets t
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT checked_at, is_up, latency_ms
    FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
    WHERE r.target_name = t.target_name
    ORDER BY checked_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) r ON true
  WHERE t.is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '%' OR t.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR t.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR t.target_name = '$target')
)
SELECT
  now() AS "time",
  environment AS metric,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE coalesce(is_up, 0) = 0)::double precision AS value
FROM latest
GROUP BY environment
ORDER BY value DESC, metric;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT
    t.target_name,
    t.environment,
    t.db_type,
    t.instance,
    t.criticality,
    t.team,
    r.checked_at,
    r.is_up,
    r.latency_ms
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets t
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT checked_at, is_up, latency_ms
    FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
    WHERE r.target_name = t.target_name
    ORDER BY checked_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) r ON true
  WHERE t.is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '%' OR t.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR t.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR t.target_name = '$target')
)
SELECT
  now() AS "time",
  db_type AS metric,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE coalesce(is_up, 0) = 0)::double precision AS value
FROM latest
GROUP BY db_type
ORDER BY value DESC, metric;

WITH minute_samples AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', r.checked_at) AS period_minute,
    r.target_name,
    max(r.environment) AS environment,
    max(r.db_type) AS db_type,
    min(r.is_up) AS is_up
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
  WHERE r.checked_at >= now() - interval '24 hours' AND ('$environment' = '%' OR r.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR r.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR r.target_name = '$target')
  GROUP BY 1, 2
), target_availability AS (
  SELECT target_name, environment, db_type, avg(is_up) AS availability
  FROM minute_samples
  GROUP BY target_name, environment, db_type
)
SELECT
  now() AS "time",
  environment || ' / ' || db_type AS metric,
  round(avg(availability)::numeric * 100, 2)::double precision AS value
FROM target_availability
GROUP BY environment, db_type
ORDER BY value ASC, metric;

WITH minute_samples AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', r.checked_at) AS period_minute,
    r.target_name,
    min(r.is_up) AS is_up
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
  WHERE $__timeFilter(r.checked_at) AND ('$environment' = '%' OR r.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR r.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR r.target_name = '$target')
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT
  period_minute AS "time",
  'down targets' AS metric,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_up = 0)::double precision AS value
FROM minute_samples
GROUP BY period_minute
ORDER BY period_minute;

WITH minute_samples AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', r.checked_at) AS period_minute,
    r.target_name,
    max(r.environment) AS environment,
    max(r.db_type) AS db_type,
    CASE
      WHEN min(r.is_up) = 1 THEN avg(r.latency_ms) FILTER (WHERE r.is_up = 1)
      ELSE NULL
    END AS latency_ms
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
  WHERE $__timeFilter(r.checked_at) AND ('$environment' = '%' OR r.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR r.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR r.target_name = '$target')
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT
  period_minute AS "time",
  environment || ' / ' || db_type AS metric,
  (avg(latency_ms) / 1000.0)::double precision AS value
FROM minute_samples
WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY period_minute, environment, db_type
ORDER BY period_minute, metric;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT
    t.target_name,
    t.environment,
    t.db_type,
    t.instance,
    t.criticality,
    t.team,
    r.checked_at,
    r.is_up,
    r.latency_ms
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets t
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT checked_at, is_up, latency_ms
    FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
    WHERE r.target_name = t.target_name
    ORDER BY checked_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) r ON true
  WHERE t.is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '%' OR t.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR t.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR t.target_name = '$target')
)

SELECT
  target_name,
  environment,
  db_type,
  instance,
  CASE WHEN is_up = 1 THEN 'UP' ELSE 'DOWN' END AS status,
  round(latency_ms::numeric, 2) AS latency_ms,
  checked_at,
  coalesce(extract(epoch FROM now() - checked_at)::bigint, 999999999) AS age_seconds
FROM latest
ORDER BY status, age_seconds DESC, target_name;

panels.title: Worst Availability in Selected Range (Hourly KPI)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  h.target_name,
  max(h.environment) AS environment,
  max(h.db_type) AS db_type,
  sum(h.probes)::bigint AS probes,
  sum(h.up_probes)::bigint AS up_probes,
  sum(h.down_probes)::bigint AS down_probes,
  round(sum(h.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(h.probes), 0) * 100, 2) AS availability_pct,
  round((sum(h.latency_ms_sum) / nullif(sum(h.latency_ms_count), 0) / 1000.0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_latency_seconds
FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_hourly_kpi h
WHERE $__timeFilter(h.period_hour) AND ('$environment' = '%' OR h.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR h.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR h.target_name = '$target')
GROUP BY h.target_name
ORDER BY availability_pct ASC, down_probes DESC, h.target_name
LIMIT 200;

SELECT
  date_trunc('month', period_start::timestamptz) AS "time",
  environment || ' / ' || db_type AS metric,
  round(sum(up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(probes), 0) * 100, 2)::double precision AS value
FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi
WHERE period_start >= current_date - interval '2192 days' AND ('$environment' = '%' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR target_name = '$target')
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT
  target_name,
  max(environment) AS environment,
  max(db_type) AS db_type,
  sum(probes)::bigint AS probes,
  sum(down_probes)::bigint AS down_probes,
  round(sum(up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(probes), 0) * 100, 2) AS availability_pct,
  round((sum(latency_ms_sum) / nullif(sum(latency_ms_count), 0) / 1000.0)::numeric, 2)::double precision AS avg_latency_seconds,
  max(last_probe_at) AS last_probe_at
FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi
WHERE period_start >= date_trunc('year', current_date)::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR target_name = '$target')
GROUP BY target_name
ORDER BY availability_pct ASC, down_probes DESC, target_name
LIMIT 200;

panels.title: DOWN Samples 24h by Env / DB Type

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  now() AS "time",
  r.environment || ' / ' || r.db_type AS metric,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE r.is_up = 0)::double precision AS value
FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
WHERE r.checked_at >= now() - interval '24 hours' AND ('$environment' = '%' OR r.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR r.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR r.target_name = '$target')
GROUP BY r.environment, r.db_type
ORDER BY value DESC, metric;

panels.title: Approx Down Minutes 24h by Env / DB Type

targets.rawSql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT now() - interval '24 hours' AS from_at, now() AS to_at
)
SELECT
  now() AS "time",
  e.environment || ' / ' || e.db_type AS metric,
  round(sum(extract(epoch FROM least(coalesce(e.down_end, now()), b.to_at) - greatest(e.down_start, b.from_at)))::numeric / 60.0, 2)::double precision AS value
FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_downtime_events e
CROSS JOIN bounds b
WHERE e.down_start < b.to_at AND coalesce(e.down_end, now()) > b.from_at AND ('$environment' = '%' OR e.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR e.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR e.target_name = '$target')
GROUP BY e.environment, e.db_type
ORDER BY value DESC, metric;

WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS from_at, $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS to_at
)
SELECT
  e.down_start,
  e.down_end,
  CASE WHEN e.down_end IS NULL THEN 'OPEN' ELSE 'CLOSED' END AS event_status,
  e.target_name,
  e.environment,
  e.db_type,
  e.instance,
  round(extract(epoch FROM least(coalesce(e.down_end, now()), b.to_at) - greatest(e.down_start, b.from_at))::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS duration_in_range_minutes,
  e.down_samples,
  e.first_error_text,
  e.last_error_text
FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_downtime_events e
CROSS JOIN bounds b
WHERE e.down_start < b.to_at AND coalesce(e.down_end, now()) > b.from_at AND ('$environment' = '%' OR e.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR e.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR e.target_name = '$target')
ORDER BY e.down_start DESC
LIMIT 300;

panels.title: Hourly Availability KPI by Env / DB Type

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  h.period_hour AS "time",
  h.environment || ' / ' || h.db_type AS metric,
  round(sum(h.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(h.probes), 0) * 100, 2)::double precision AS value
FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_hourly_kpi h
WHERE $__timeFilter(h.period_hour) AND ('$environment' = '%' OR h.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR h.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR h.target_name = '$target')
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT
  s.event_at,
  s.target_name,
  s.environment,
  s.db_type,
  s.instance,
  CASE WHEN s.previous_is_up = 1 THEN 'UP' WHEN s.previous_is_up = 0 THEN 'DOWN' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS previous_status,
  CASE WHEN s.current_is_up = 1 THEN 'UP' ELSE 'DOWN' END AS current_status,
  round(s.latency_ms::numeric, 2) AS latency_ms,
  s.error_text
FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_status_events s
WHERE $__timeFilter(s.event_at) AND ('$environment' = '%' OR s.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR s.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR s.target_name = '$target')
ORDER BY s.event_at DESC
LIMIT 300;

panels.title: Slow Latency Events in Selected Range

targets.rawSql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS from_at, $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS to_at
)
SELECT
  e.slow_start,
  e.slow_end,
  CASE WHEN e.slow_end IS NULL THEN 'OPEN' ELSE 'CLOSED' END AS event_status,
  e.target_name,
  e.environment,
  e.db_type,
  e.instance,
  e.threshold_ms,
  round(extract(epoch FROM least(coalesce(e.slow_end, now()), b.to_at) - greatest(e.slow_start, b.from_at))::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS duration_in_range_minutes,
  e.slow_samples,
  round(e.latency_ms_sum / nullif(e.latency_ms_count, 0), 2) AS avg_latency_ms,
  round(e.max_latency_ms, 2) AS max_latency_ms
FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_latency_events e
CROSS JOIN bounds b
WHERE e.slow_start < b.to_at AND coalesce(e.slow_end, now()) > b.from_at AND ('$environment' = '%' OR e.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR e.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR e.target_name = '$target')
ORDER BY e.slow_start DESC
LIMIT 300;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT environment AS __text, environment AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Environment
list.name: environment
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT environment AS __text, environment AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT db_type AS __text, db_type AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets WHERE is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '%' OR environment = '$environment') ORDER BY 1;
list.label: DB Type
list.name: db_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT db_type AS __text, db_type AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets WHERE is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '%' OR environment = '$environment') ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT target_name AS __text, target_name AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets WHERE is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '%' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR db_type = '$db_type') ORDER BY 1;
list.label: DB Name
list.name: target
list.query: SELECT target_name AS __text, target_name AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets WHERE is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '%' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR db_type = '$db_type') ORDER BY 1;
